personal.name: Nazmus Sakib Ohee
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer & AI Specialist
personal.description: I’m a Senior Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience building scalable web applications across e-commerce, finance, healthcare, and education. I specialise in Laravel and PHP, creating secure, maintainable, and growth-ready software. With an MSc in Artificial Intelligence (Distinction), published AI research, and multiple hackathon wins, I combine strong engineering expertise with AI innovation to deliver high-quality web, API, and AI-powered solutions.
personal.about: Senior Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience and an MSc in Artificial Intelligence with Distinction. I specialise in building bespoke Laravel applications that are clean, scalable, and built to last — from solo freelance projects to enterprise-grade systems. A multiple national hackathon champion, a published researcher in real-time machine learning, and a Fiverr Level 2 seller with 500+ professional connections. I translate complex requirements into elegant, high-quality software and take pride in every line of code I ship.

achievements.description: Graduated with MSc. in Artificial Intelligence with Distinction — Teesside University, United Kingdom.
Graduated with BSc. in Computer Science & Engineering — with Distinction, Sylhet International University, Bangladesh.
"Real-Time Tiger Detection using YOLOv3", International Journal of Computer Applications, 2020.
Champion — National Hackathon at Leading University, Sylhet.
Runner-up — National Digital Sylhet City Idea Hackathon.
First Place — Android & Mobile Game Development, National ICT Competition.

experience.description: Developing bespoke software and websites for new and existing clients. Implementing new features upon request and resolving complex technical issues. Communicating directly with clients and third parties to deliver speedy, high-quality resolutions. Core stack: PHP, Laravel, AJAX, MySQL, and related technologies.

Applied cutting-edge AI methodologies to solve complex real-world problems — spanning machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, and computer vision. Developed intelligent systems and algorithms, analysed large datasets, built predictive models, and engineered automation pipelines to improve decision-making processes.

Elected representative for the MSc Artificial Intelligence cohort. Served as the primary liaison between students and faculty, channelling feedback, raising concerns, and working collaboratively with academic staff to continuously improve the programme experience.

Developed custom web software solutions for clients across the globe, achieving Level 2 Seller status. Negotiated project scopes, translated client requirements into technical specifications, and delivered production-grade applications using PHP, Laravel, Mailchimp, Mailgun, and related tools.

Contributed to web application development for a US/Spain-based software company as a part-time remote developer. Worked with advanced PHP and MySQL to build and maintain client-facing features within a distributed engineering team.

Delivered weekly three-hour training sessions covering PHP and Laravel from fundamentals to advanced patterns. Introduced task-based learning methodologies for junior developers, fostering a collaborative environment and significantly improving student project output.

Led web development efforts for a Sylhet-based technology firm. Performed complex source code development, directed the engineering workflow, and collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver client projects on schedule using PHP, CSS3, and related technologies.

Conducted weekly two-hour sessions on C programming fundamentals. Facilitated problem-solving games to sharpen students' analytical and algorithmic thinking. Mentored students in C, C++, and competitive programming — consistently achieving an attendance of 20+ students and receiving excellent evaluations from faculty and course participants.

services.title: Bespoke Web Development
services.description: End-to-end custom web applications built on Laravel and PHP — architected for performance, security, and long-term scalability. From complex business logic and multi-role systems to API integrations and third-party services, I deliver polished software that fits your exact requirements.

services.title: AI & Intelligent Solutions
services.description: Combining 9+ years of software engineering with an MSc in Artificial Intelligence (Distinction), I design and integrate machine learning models, intelligent automation, and data-driven features into web and enterprise applications — turning your data into a competitive advantage.

services.title: IT Consulting & Virtual Staff
services.description: Available as a dedicated virtual engineer or technical consultant. I help businesses fill their engineering gap with flexible, cost-effective expertise — whether that's a full project build, ongoing development support, or strategic technical guidance to steer your product roadmap.

projects.description: Bioscope is a photography and videography company based in Michigan, USA — built with a custom Laravel backend and dynamic content management.
projects.name: BIOSCOPE.US

projects.description: ATE Services is a UK-based company that maintains and installs Heat Pumps, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration Equipment — built with a custom business management system.

footer.about: Problem solver. Builder. Researcher. I turn complex challenges into clean, elegant software — driven by a passion for quality, a competitive edge sharpened across national hackathons, and a commitment to continuous learning. Let's build something great together.
